data.current_description: Verify the validity of the provided API key.
data.description_suggestion: Validates the provided API key for authentication. Accepts an API key in the request and verifies its validity against the system. Returns a validation response indicating whether the key is valid and active. This operation is typically used to confirm API credentials before making other API calls.

message: Operation 'createTask' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, missing_context. Original description 'Generate a new task entry' is too generic and lacks domain context. Enhanced description incorporates Focus Commit-specific concepts (Kanban board, GTD, Pomodoro), clarifies expected inputs (title, description, priority, project), explains the response (task object with ID), and describes integration with the app's productivity features. This helps AI agents understand the task creation workflow and available options.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new task in the Focus Commit system. Accepts task details such as title, description, priority, and optional project assignment. The task is added to the user's task list and can be organized using Kanban board columns or GTD categories. Returns the created task object with its unique identifier and initial state. Tasks can be subsequently managed through Pomodoro sessions.
